title: Withered Utils
description: Optimization modpack with many pre-configured technical tools and HUD/GUI improvements.
body:
Withered Utils is a optimization modpack that doesn't change vanilla content and adds many useful tools.

26.1.2 alpha will be available soon.

It lets you play on any server thanks to [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus) but beware of the servers rules, some of the mods features might be considered cheating.

## Performance
It includes the usual performance mods you can find on modrinth's first page but also less known ones like [Better Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-block-entities).

On a gaming laptop with a Ryzen 5 7535HS and a RTX 3050 4GB it gets 300-350 FPS without shaders and 80 FPS with BSL at medium setting (16 chunks).
Nvidium 1.21.10 is from [drouarb/nvidium](https://github.com/drouarb/nvidium/releases).          

Also works on Mobile Launchers; a GalaxyA14 using MobileGlues with ANGLE as OpenGL ES Driver gets stable 60 FPS without shaders (8 chunks).

## HUD and GUIs

- [Simple Armor Hud](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-armor-hud)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- [Status Effects Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars) 
- [Leave My Bars Alone](https://modrinth.com/mod/leave-my-bars-alone)
- [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [MiniHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud)
- [Don't Hide My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/dont-hide-my-items)
- [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements)
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats)
- [BoatView360](https://modrinth.com/mod/boatview360)

## Utilities
- [Tweakaroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo)
- [MiniHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud)
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)
- [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)
- [World Edit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
- [Zoomify ](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)
- [LibrGetter](https://modrinth.com/mod/libr-getter)

**[Full list + descriptions](https://github.com/Seminosowo/Withered-Utils/blob/3f21a7f1be2e231fd9016376f3fc5566ffe91f05/Modlist.md).**

**You can find tables with all the configured keybinds near the end of this description.**

## Resource Packs
- [Enchanted Books: Re-covered](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchanted-books-re-covered)
- [Gentler Weather Sounds ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gentler-weather-sounds)
- [Clear Weather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clear-weather)
- [Low On Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-on-fire)
- [No Pumpkin Blur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-pumpkin-blur)
- [Better Wither Heart](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-wither-heart)
- [Undopia Lower Shield](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undopia-lower-shield)
- [Outlined Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ore-outlines)
- [Redstone Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redstone-tweaks)
- [Lightmap Fixer](https://modrinth.com/shader/lightmap-fixer)

**[Full list + descriptions](https://github.com/Seminosowo/Withered-Utils/blob/2c5b529418faa2b95d47284de5d631a7b482e027/Resource%20pack%20list.md).**

## Keybinds

### Tweakaroo
| Feature          | Keybind             |             
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| Open Config Menu | X + C |
| Freecam | V | 
| GammaOverride | Y | 
| CustomFlyDecelaration| X + D |
| Periodic Attack | X + . |
| Periodic Use | X + , |
| BreakReplace | X + R | 
| Angel Place | X + A |
| Fast Place | X + F |
| Flexible Placements | X + E |
| Offset Flexible Placement | Left Ctrl |
| Rotation Flexible Placement | Left Alt |

_Angel Place is creative only_


#### MiniHUD 
| Feature          | Keybind             |             
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| Open Config Menu | H + C |
| Toggle Main Rendering | H |
| Light Level overlay | H + N |
| Shulker Box Preview | Shift |

### Litematica
| Feature          | Keybind             |             
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| Open Config Menu | M |
| Toggle Main Rendering | M + R |
| Toggle Tool Rendering | M + T |
| Execute Operation | M + H |

### Miscellaneous
| Feature          | Keybind             |             
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| Open Xaero's World Map | G |
| Open Waypoints Menu | U |
| LibrGetter Menu | Right Alt |
| Zoom | C |
| Vanilla Keybind Manager | X + O |



If you encounter issues or need any help with configurations, you can contact us **[here](https://github.com/Seminosowo/Withered-Utils/issues).**
